description: Conditional elements should appear and disappear based on state
initialVDOM: dom.el('div', 'root', {}, [dom.el('span', 'counter', {}, [dom.txt(String(state.count), 'cnt')]), state.showDetails ? dom.el('p', 'details', { class: 'details' }, [dom.txt('Details are visible', 'dtxt')]) : dom.cmt('no-details', 'placeholder')])

steps.newVDOM: dom.el('div', 'root', {}, [dom.el('span', 'counter', {}, [dom.txt(String(state.count), 'cnt')]), state.showDetails ? dom.el('p', 'details', { class: 'details' }, [dom.txt('Details are visible', 'dtxt')]) : dom.cmt('no-details', 'placeholder')])

dom.el('div', 'root', {}, [dom.el('span', 'counter', {}, [dom.txt(String(state.count), 'cnt')]), state.showDetails ? dom.el('p', 'details', { class: 'details' }, [dom.txt('Details are visible', 'dtxt')]) : dom.cmt('no-details', 'placeholder')])

dom.el('div', 'root', {}, [dom.el('span', 'counter', {}, [dom.txt(String(state.count), 'cnt')]), state.showDetails ? dom.el('p', 'details', { class: 'details' }, [dom.txt('Details are visible', 'dtxt')]) : dom.cmt('no-details', 'placeholder')])
